title: Dreamy Smoky Italian Plum Tomatoes Carbonara
description: A smoky and shaggy Italian dish featuring plum tomatoes and a rich glaze, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and egg-free friendly. This dish is a creative twist on the classic carbonara.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and cook the vegetarian bacon until crispy.
Add the smoked paprika and garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the crushed plum tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the grated grana padano cheese and cook until melted and smooth.
Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the tomato sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the spaghetti hot, topped with chopped fresh parsley and additional grated cheese if desired.
